name: 16p11_2_TP53TG3_SD
description: 16p11.2 TP53TG3 SD cluster — a multi-copy tandem array of TP53TG3/TP53TG3B/TP53TG3C/TP53TG3D/TP53TG3E/TP53TG3F paralogs at >99.5% identity, lying within the 16p11.2 proximal recurrent CNV region. Contributes to copy-number heterogeneity inside BP4-BP5.

architecture.internal_structure: Six TP53TG3 paralog copies in tandem direct orientation at >99.5% identity; CNV in the population (3-12 copies).
